notes: Age is available for all subjects. Nearly all trials have age criteria.
~5% of trials have sex-specific criteria. Sex field available for all subjects.

criterion_text: Central subfield thickness >= X um (varies: 300-400 um typical)
notes: ETDRS Grid center zone maps directly to CST. Device-specific and sex-dependent thresholds exist (e.g., THULITE: >=305 um female, >=320 um male). OCT vendor calibration differences may apply.

criterion_text: Presence of intraretinal fluid on OCT
notes: IRO from RETscreenAI provides binary detection. Not validated against reading center standards. Binary flag, no volumetric quantification.

criterion_text: Presence of subretinal fluid on OCT
notes: SRO from RETscreenAI. Same validation caveats as IRO.

criterion_text: Pigment epithelial detachment present on OCT
notes: PED from RETscreenAI. Does not differentiate PED subtypes.

RPE Loss from RETscreenAI detects presence but does not quantify GA lesion area (mm2). Many GA trials require specific area thresholds (e.g., 2.5-17.5 mm2 for OAKS/DERBY). FAF measurement is typically required.

criterion_text: RNFL thinning consistent with glaucomatous damage
notes: RNFL thickness is structural evidence only. Glaucoma diagnosis requires IOP and visual field testing, which are not available in iDHEA. Can flag structurally suspicious cases for further workup.
Same as RNFL -- structural only, not diagnostic of glaucoma.
C/D ratio from OCT disc topography. High C/D is a risk factor but not diagnostic alone.
Axial length is an estimate from OCT, not direct biometry. Precision versus IOLMaster/Lenstar is unknown.

criterion_text: BCVA between 24-78 ETDRS letters (varies by trial)
notes: Visual acuity is not captured in the iDHEA dataset. This is the single highest-impact data gap -- present in ~90% of retinal trial eligibility criteria.

criterion_text: Confirmed Type 1 or Type 2 diabetes diagnosis
notes: Diabetes status and HbA1c are not in the iDHEA dataset. Required for all DME/DR trials.

criterion_text: IOP within range (e.g., >= 22 mmHg for OHT, or controlled < 21 mmHg)
notes: Intraocular pressure is not captured in iDHEA. Required for all glaucoma trial enrollment.

criterion_text: Treatment-naive or adequate washout period from prior anti-VEGF/steroid
notes: Prior treatment history is not available in iDHEA.

criterion_text: Not pregnant or nursing; adequate contraception
notes: Pregnancy status not captured in iDHEA. Standard exclusion in ~95% of trials.

criterion_text: DRSS level 43-53 (moderately severe to severe NPDR)
notes: DR severity grading on ETDRS scale not available. Potential future use of RETFound embeddings with validated classifier.
